top_signals.title: China's May shipments to the U.S. surge 35% to 5-year high as overall exports defy Iran war drag
top_signals.summary: Exports to the U.S. surged the most since March 2021, extending a rebound following a long streak of double-digit declines for the most of last year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ASML chief warns EU against directing chip supplies
top_signals.summary: Industry needs ‘champions’, not intervention, says Christophe Fouquet, head of Europe’s biggest listed company
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Why the film industry needs franchises like Star Wars
top_signals.summary: Blockbusters keep cinemas open and leave room for quirkier originals to thrive
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SpaceX’s $1.78tn IPO asks investors to buy Musk’s moonshots
top_signals.summary: Public markets asked to price in advances in AI, Starlink and space-based computing long before lift-off
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Indonesia’s Bond Selloff Extends as Five-Year Note Yield Surges
top_signals.summary: Indonesia’s debt market selloff deepened as the nation’s five-year bond yield climbed to the highest level in more than six years.

top_signals.title: Why are we still arguing about the industrial revolution?
top_signals.summary: Historical data does not offer much insight about how our predecessors navigated profound change
